description: Letter from Yehuda b. [...] to Avraham Maimonides. In Judaeo-Arabic. The name of the city Tripoli appears after the sender's name, much of which is visible and may be decipherable: [?]...יהודה בן ח. He reports on a legal dispute with R. Shem[...] and asks for instructions from Avraham and/or whether they must report to him in person. Avraham Maimonides is referred to as "Nagid," a title that he bore after 1213 CE during his tenure as Rayyis between 1205–1237 CE.
description_he: מכתב מיהודה בן [...] לאברהם מימוניד ביהודית-ערבית. מדווח על סכסוך משפטי עם ר' שם[...] ומבקש הוראות מאברהם. אברהם מימוניד מכונה 'נגיד', תואר שנשא לאחר 1213 לספירה.
